'''Forii Haxa''' was a being affiliated with the [[Exchange]] and an owner of the ''[[Ebon Hawk]]''. Haxa later met a tragic [[Death/Legends|death]], an occurrence that helped contribute to the underworld rumor that the ''Hawk'' was an unlucky [[Starship/Legends|ship]].
